title: heliophila odorans
intro: Heliophila odorans, also known as the 'Scented Heliophila' or 'Baboon Flower', is a flowering plant native to South Africa, characterized by its small yellow flowers with a strong, unpleasant odor. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, with its roots and leaves possessing medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Heliophila odorans include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
